headline: Peak Technologies Announces CEO Transition as Company Enters Next Stage of Growth
summary: LITTLETON, Mass., July 09, 2026--Peak Technologies (Peak), a leading global systems integrator and solutions provider, today announced that Joachim (Joe) Heel has been appointed Chief Executive Officer. Backed by Sole Source Capital, Peak continues to invest in its leadership and capabilities as the company enters its next phase of growth, expanding its technology, services, and systems integration capabilities to meet the evolving needs of customers across the retail, manufacturing, warehousing

content.title: Peak Technologies Announces CEO Transition as Company Enters Next Stage of Growth
content.summary: LITTLETON, Mass., July 09, 2026--Peak Technologies (Peak), a leading global systems integrator and solutions provider, today announced that Joachim (Joe) Heel has been appointed Chief Executive Officer. Backed by Sole Source Capital, Peak continues to invest in its leadership and capabilities as the company enters its next phase of growth, expanding its technology, services, and systems integration capabilities to meet the evolving needs of customers across the retail, manufacturing, warehousing

headline: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Lifts Outlook On A Narrative That Still Sees Undervaluation
summary: What Zebra Technologies’ New Outlook Signals for Investors Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) has raised its full year sales growth forecast and is guiding to double digit sales growth for Q2 2026, prompting fresh attention on how the stock is priced today. See our latest analysis for Zebra Technologies. Recent index additions to the Russell 2500 and Russell 2500 Value benchmarks, together with guidance for double digit Q2 2026 sales growth, have coincided with a 30 day share price return of 12.86%...
